message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "lemma fps_comp_coeff_finsum_eq_sum (f g : K⟦X⟧) (hg : constantCoeff g = 0) (n : ℕ) :\n    finsum (fun d ↦ coeff d f * coeff n (g ^ d)) = ∑ d in Finset.range (n + 1), coeff d f * coeff n (g ^ d) :=\nby\n  apply finsum_eq_sum_of_support_subset\n  intro d hd\n  have hmem : d ∉ Finset.range (n + 1) := hd\n  rw [Finset.mem_range] at hmem\n  have hnd : n < d := by omega\n  have hzero : coeff n (g ^ d) = 0 := fps_subs_wd_firstCoeffs g hg d n hnd\n  simpa",
  "declaration_name": "fps_comp_coeff_finsum_eq_sum",
  "used_context": [
    "fps_subs_wd_firstCoeffs",
    "finsum_eq_sum_of_support_subset",
    "Finset.mem_range",
    "coeff",
    "omega"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "The proof uses `omega` for arithmetic; it is available in the project context."
  ]
}
